findings.evidence: `roadmap/TauCetiRoadmap/Multiquadratic/README.md:21` names `mem_sup_adjoin_sq` as a migration source and says to credit it in each ported file; `TauCeti/FieldTheory/IntermediateField/Quadratic.lean:20-113` defines the `mem_sup_adjoin_sq` API with no `Provenance` block.
findings.fix: Add a provenance paragraph to this module crediting `kim-em/erdos-unit-distance` and Alpöge, consistent with `SquareClass.lean`.
findings.issue: This file introduces `mem_sup_adjoin_sq`, which the roadmap identifies as migrated from `ErdosUnitDistance/MultiquadraticField.lean`, but the file has no provenance credit.

summary: The main multiquadratic file credits the migrated source, but the split quadratic normal-form file contains one of the explicitly migrated declarations without its own provenance note.
